name: code-lint
description: Automatic code quality enforcement with multi-language linting. Runs linters automatically on file edits via Cursor hooks, providing instant feedback in your AI chat. Supports per-project configuration with .linter.json. Works with ESLint, Pylint, RuboCop, golint, and more. Zero manual intervention required.
longDescription:
This plugin integrates seamlessly with Cursor's hook system to provide automatic linting on every file save. When you edit a file, the lint-daemon:
- Detects the file's language automatically
- Runs the appropriate linter (ESLint, Pylint, etc.)
- Returns formatted results to Cursor AI
- Allows AI to fix issues immediately

Supports project-level configuration via .linter.json to customize linters, disable specific rules, or add custom commands.
features: Automatic linting on file edits (Write, Edit tools)
Multi-language support (JS/TS, Python, Ruby, Go, etc.)
usageExamples: Automatic: Edit any file, linter runs automatically

requiresSetup.linters: Install linters: npm install -g eslint, pip install pylint, etc.
